title: jalpatel11/calmindra
summary: A Dockerized, full-stack mental-health chatbot with a Next.js/TypeScript frontend, FastAPI backend, and locally hosted Ollama model for empathetic, context-aware conversations.

title: Nikelroid/adversarial-coevolution
summary: Adversarial Co-Evolution of RL and LLM Agents: A framework for training high-performance PPO agents against Large Language Models in Gin Rummy, utilizing curriculum learning and knowledge distillation.

title: thekaveh/atlas
summary: Atlas — self-hosted, source-configurable, multi-disciplinary engineering platform for gen-AI, ML, and data work. 30+ OSS Docker Compose services (Ollama, LiteLLM, Supabase, n8n, Airflow, Spark, Weaviate, Neo4j, JupyterHub, Ray, ComfyUI, …) pre-wired behind Kong. Interactive TUI wizard, configurable tracks, one-command launch.

title: Pankaj-jpeg/Finsight
summary: Agentic RAG financial terminal · Analyzes SEC filings with local LLMs · Hybrid vector search · Zero cloud dependency

title: rupertgermann/open-recall
summary: Privacy-focused, local-first Personal Knowledge Management powered by GraphRAG. Ingest articles, notes & PDFs, then chat with your knowledge using hybrid vector + graph search. Runs locally with Ollama. 100% AI-written.

title: RahulBiju-dev/AI-CLI-Agent
summary: A privacy-first, local AI desktop agent. Wraps Gemma 4 in a modular Python framework, enabling autonomous web searching and system-level tool execution directly from the Linux terminal. Zero API keys required.

title: rockykusuma/smriti
summary: Local, private screen memory for macOS — Claude (or a local Ollama model) as the brain. No cloud, no telemetry.

title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
summary: ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

title: doncazper/model-router
summary: Local AI control center and routing/control plane for OpenAI-compatible agents, local runtimes, receipts, telemetry, and safety policy.

title: zedarvates/botte-secrete
summary: Token Efficiency Toolkit — Reduce AI token consumption with proven patterns, local hardware acceleration, and smart workflows

title: rkfsociety/CodeViper
summary: Локальный AI-агент для программирования — чат, файлы, терминал. Ollama, OpenAI, Gemini, Claude. Без подписок.

title: Aseiel/VideoHighlighter
summary: Open-source local AI video analyzer powered by Ollama. Visual search, automatic highlights, scene/action/object detection, audio analysis, and subtitle generation. Free, offline alternative to Twelve Labs, Runway, and Descript.

title: backupliton98-star/ai-commander-core
summary: Kodiqa-agent 2026 - Open Source AI Coding Agent with 7 Providers & 69 Commands

title: jpoindexter/Vanta
summary: A local AI agent with a Rust safety kernel that gates every action — goal-aware, provider-agnostic, self-hosted. MIT.

title: Aivyx-Agent/aivyx
summary: A local-first, self-learning personal AI agent in Rust — governed autonomy, signed identity, and a memory that's yours. Source-available (BUSL-1.1).

title: tahsinmert/AgVoiceX
summary: Self-hosted local-first AI voice-agent platform with FastAPI, Next.js, Ollama, LM Studio, n8n, PostgreSQL, multi-tenant agents, RAG, STT and TTS.

title: denzo69/local-ai-workspace
summary: Local-first AI workspace built with FastAPI, Ollama, memory, RAG and secure tooling.

title: daya7781r/miii-cli-offline-coder
summary: Miii-CLI 2026: Zero-Cost Local AI Coding Agent with Ollama – Fully Offline & Private

title: CrispStrobe/CrispSorter
summary: AI-powered document organiser. Extracts text and/or sorts documents: Drop in a bunch of PDFs, DOCX files, or ebooks, and it extracts Document Text, identifies Title, Author, and Year, with a local or remote LLM, and moves them into folders, and/or keeps the extracted text.

title: phuetz/code-buddy
summary: Open-source multi-provider AI coding agent — terminal + Electron desktop (Cowork) + 24/7 multi-AI fleet, free-first on local Ollama. Opt-in, human-gated evolutionary self-improvement that ingests research to set its own goals. 15 LLM providers (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok), ~110 tools, MCP, voice+vision companion.
